decimals.title: Decimals
decimals.description: Number of decimal places used by the token.

totalSupply.title: Total Supply
totalSupply.description: Total amount of tokens in existence.

balanceOf.title: Balance
balanceOf.description: Check the token balance of an address.

allowance.title: Allowance
allowance.description: Check how many tokens an address has approved another address to spend.

approve.title: Approve
approve.description: Approve a spender to transfer up to the given amount of your tokens.
approve.warning: Approving unlimited amounts is common but carries risk if the spender contract is compromised.

transferFrom.title: Transfer From
transferFrom.description: Transfer tokens from one address to another, using a previously set allowance.

Permit.title: Token Permit (EIP-2612)
Permit.description: Approve a spender to transfer your tokens via an off-chain signature, avoiding a separate approve transaction.
Permit.warning: This grants token spending permission. Verify the spender address and amount carefully. Phishing sites commonly request Permit signatures to drain wallets.
Permit.intent: Permit {spender} to spend {value} of your tokens until {deadline}

owner.label: owner
owner.description: The token holder granting the approval

spender.label: spender
spender.description: The address being approved to spend tokens

value.label: amount
value.description: Maximum amount the spender can transfer

deadline.label: deadline
deadline.description: Unix timestamp after which the permit expires

Approval.description: Emitted when an approval is set.
